text: I always check the ingredient list before buying anything. If I can't understand what's in it, I won't use it.
Love the products but they're so expensive. I only buy during sales.
I don't have time for a 10-step routine. Just tell me the 3 things I need and I'll buy them.
My skin has completely transformed in 3 months. I get compliments all the time now.
Every other brand has a loyalty program. Why doesn't this one?
My esthetician introduced me to this brand and I've never looked back.
Shipping took 10 days. That's way too long in 2025.
The retinol serum is worth every penny. Real visible results.
I've been using this brand for 15 years and my skin has never looked better. I recommend it to everyone.
Wish there was a rewards program. I've been a customer for years and get nothing for my loyalty.
Bought the kit because it took the guesswork out. Best decision I made for my skin.
Saw a TikTok review and had to try it. Waited for the 20% off sale though.
The fact that skin therapists use these products gives me so much confidence.
Product arrived with the box crushed and serum leaking. Very disappointing.
I switched from a competitor because they changed their formula without telling anyone.
A points system or VIP tier would make me buy exclusively from the brand.
My esthetician recommended this and it's the first thing that actually worked for my dark spots.
The website has SO many products. I just want someone to tell me what to use.
Was devastated when they discontinued my favorite moisturizer. Please bring it back!
More brands should be upfront about concentrations like this one is.
